_comment: Each promo can have an optional date window (startDate/endDate, format YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive). Promos with no dates are always active. Only active promos are woven into the slideshow rotation.

promotions.headline: Free Appraisals
promotions.subtext: Bring in your gold, silver, or coins for a no-obligation quote — every day, walk-ins welcome.

promotions.headline: Holiday Gift Event
promotions.subtext: Estate jewelry and watches, newly arrived for the season.

promotions.headline: Spring Buying Event
promotions.subtext: Top prices paid on gold and silver this month — bring in your items today.

promotions.headline: Summer Coin Show Special
promotions.subtext: New rare coin arrivals from the collector's show now on display.
